mapper.sql:
WHERE c.branch_seq = #{branchSeq}
AND c.phone_number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND c.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND c.status IN ('신규', '진행중')
mapper.select:
SELECT c.seq, c.name, c.phone_number AS phoneNumber, c.comment, c.commercial_name AS commercialName, c.ad_source AS adSource, c.call_count AS callCount, c.status, c.created_date AS createdDate, c.last_update_date AS lastUpdateDate FROM customers c
ORDER BY c.created_date DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
